query:

INSERT INTO services (externalId, serviceType, serviceTypeDetail, planName, supplierName, 
                      customerExternalId, customerName, phoneNumber, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue,
                      status, billingPlatform, discoveryNotes, createdAt, updatedAt)
